case_id: Multiple patients: DUBOIS, LAMBERT, PERRIN, NICOLAS

pi_items.metadata_value: Hypertension + Type 2 diabetes documented in terrain but no active prescription
pi_items.verified_value: Condition documented as valid clinical management gap; setup_task.sh plants HTA and T2DM in terrain without prescription
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 91-109; Medical guidelines: both HTA and T2DM require active treatment

pi_items.metadata_value: Atrial fibrillation (Fibrillation auriculaire) documented but only aspirin prescribed — anticoagulation required per guidelines
pi_items.verified_value: Condition requires anticoagulation per CHA2DS2-VASc scoring guidelines. ESC/ACC guidelines state antiplatelet therapy alone is NOT recommended for AF stroke prevention (Class III). Anticoagulation indicated for CHA2DS2-VASc ≥2 in men or ≥3 in women
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 114-154 plants AF with aspirin-only. Web search: CHA2DS2-VASc score guidelines, ESC 2020 Atrial Fibrillation Guidelines, ARTESiA study showing apixaban superiority

pi_items.metadata_value: COPD patient with last follow-up 2025-05-15 — over 9 months overdue for review
pi_items.verified_value: Overdue per GOLD guidelines recommending yearly spirometry/follow-up for COPD. Timeline: 2025-05-15 to 2026-03-08 = ~297 days (10 months), exceeds 6-month guideline for maintenance appointments
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 179-187 plants COPD with last consultation 2025-05-15. Web search: GOLD COPD guidelines recommend yearly follow-up; Swedish guidelines recommend 1-6 month appointments depending on severity

pi_items.metadata_value: Migraine with aura documented in terrain but combined oral contraceptive (ethinylestradiol) prescribed — absolute contraindication
pi_items.verified_value: Absolute contraindication confirmed. Combined hormonal contraceptives containing ethinylestradiol are contraindicated in migraine with aura due to significantly increased stroke risk (odds ratio 5-17x). Current medical consensus (EHF, ESC, Stanford Medicine, American Migraine Foundation) advises against COCs in migraine with aura patients
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 203-240 plants migraine with aura + combined OCP (LUDEAL/ethinylestradiol). Web search: PMC/NIHBI, Stanford Medicine, American Migraine Foundation, Cleveland Clinic, ESC/EHF consensus statements
setup_task.sh line 3 comment confirms 4 issues planted; verifier.py and README confirm 4 scoring sections
verifier.py line 130 and README line 51 both confirm pass_threshold of 50/100
setup_task.sh uses 20020100 consistently for prescription rubrics (lines 110, 142, 190, 222); export_result.sh line 110 queries TypeRub=20020100 for prescriptions
setup_task.sh uses 20030000 for consultation rubrics (lines 109, 131, 153, 187, 230); export_result.sh queries TypeRub=20030000
setup_task.sh uses 20060000 for terrain rubrics (lines 86, 98, 119, 131, 163, 177, 208, 219); task_utils.sh confirms real schema structure

privileged_info_summary: The task plants four real clinical management gaps in synthetic patient records. DUBOIS has hypertension and type 2 diabetes without medication (verified clinical gap). LAMBERT has documented atrial fibrillation but receives only aspirin, violating ESC/ACC guidelines requiring anticoagulation for CHA2DS2-VASc ≥2 (verified high-stroke-risk contraindication). PERRIN has COPD with last follow-up on 2025-05-15, now ~10 months overdue, exceeding GOLD guidelines for yearly review (verified overdue follow-up). NICOLAS has migraine with aura combined with ethinylestradiol-containing oral contraceptive, an absolute contraindication due to 5-17x increased stroke risk per EHF/ESC guidelines (verified dangerous drug-disease interaction). All four clinical issues are real, evidence-based management gaps that require correction. However, the patient dates of birth in task.json are factually incorrect: DUBOIS listed as 1960-07-21 (actual 1962-07-08), LAMBERT as 1947-10-07 (actual 1983-01-17), PERRIN as 1950-02-02 (actual 1958-02-28), NICOLAS as 1981-09-06 (actual 1987-12-03). These DOB discrepancies do not affect task execution since the setup script searches by name only.
